query:
-- Fix 1: Voice - Direct In Dial Numbers
-- These are geographic DIDs: wholesale $0.33, retail $2.00 per DID
-- Cost = revenue × (0.33/2.00) = 16.5% of retail
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = ROUND(monthlyRevenue * 0.165, 2),
    costSource = 'Pricebook (DID Australia $0.33/DID, derived from revenue)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName = 'Voice - Direct In Dial Numbers'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost = 20.00;

-- Fix 2: Single Number
-- Same as geographic DID: wholesale $0.33, retail $2.00
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = ROUND(monthlyRevenue * 0.165, 2),
    costSource = 'Pricebook (DID Australia $0.33/DID, derived from revenue)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName = 'Single Number'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost = 6.00;

-- Fix 3: Basic seats
-- Wholesale $5.80/seat (from $69.60/12 bundle), retail $6.00/seat
-- Cost = revenue × (5.80/6.00) = 96.67% of retail
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = ROUND(monthlyRevenue * (5.80/6.00), 2),
    costSource = 'Pricebook (Basic User $5.80/seat derived from bundle, corrected from flat $69.60)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName = 'Basic'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND monthlyCost = 69.60;

-- Fix 4: Update the pricebook entry for Basic to correct per-seat price
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map
SET wholesaleCost = 5.80,
    notes = 'Corrected: per-seat price. Original $69.60 was 12-seat bundle price. Confirmed from ST-6796 Clovelly invoice: 1 Basic seat = $6.00 retail, ~$5.80 wholesale.',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 30037 AND productName = 'Basic';

-- Fix 5: Update DID pricebook - Direct In Dial AU Mobile Number should not match geographic DIDs
-- The $20 entry is for MOBILE DIDs only - add a note
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map
SET notes = 'MOBILE DID only - do NOT apply to geographic DIDs. Geographic DID = $0.33/month (see DID Australia (1) entry)',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 87 AND productName = 'Direct In Dial AU Mobile Number (1)';
